title: Advice To A Young Author
content:
First begin
    Taking in.
    Cargo stored,
    All aboard,
    Think about
    Giving out.
    Empty ship,
    Useless trip!

    Never strain
    Weary brain,
    Hardly fit,
    Wait a bit!
    After rest
    Comes the best.

    Sitting still,
    Let it fill;
    Never press;
    Nerve stress
    Always shows.
    Nature knows.

    Critics kind,
    Never mind!
    Critics flatter,
    No matter!
    Critics curse,
    None the worse.
    Critics blame,
    All the same!
    Do your best.
    Hang the rest!
meaning:
"Advice To A Young Author" is a quintessential example of Arthur Conan Doyle's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
